entry.title: kcsp-解题技术.md
entry.content:
解题

  • kotlin
  • nc
  • zxing
  • ps
  • 在线解密网站
  • 基本图像处理知识

kotlin

java写答题类的代码会过于复杂，所以用kotlin,建类什么的方便一些。

给大家举几个例子,

data class EchartNodeLink(val source: String, val target: String)

data class TagScore(val nodeId: String, val score: Double, val linkCount: Int)
 val visitfp = "/media/lame/0DD80F300DD80F30/code/koal-helper/src/main/resources/人当天访问数据.csv"
    val users = HashMap<String, User>()
    FileUtils.readLines(File(visitfp)).forEach {
        val fields = extractDbcsvField(it)
        val visitInfo = Visit(
            fields[VisitUser.USER_ID],
            fields[VisitUser.HOST],
            Integer.parseInt(fields[VisitUser.VISIT_NUM]),
            fields[VisitUser.DATE]
        )
        val user = User(fields[VisitUser.USER_ID], arrayListOf(visitInfo))
        users[fields[VisitUser.USER_ID]]?.also { oldIt -> user.visitInfo.addAll(oldIt.visitInfo) }
        users[fields[VisitUser.USER_ID]] = user
    }
    val avgVisit: HashMap<String, EmailAvgVisit> = HashMap()
    users.values.flatMap { it.visitInfo }.filter { it.host == "mail.koal.com" }.forEach {
        val newVisit = EmailAvgVisit(it.userId, it.visitNum)
        avgVisit[it.userId]?.also { v -> newVisit.visitNum = (newVisit.visitNum + v.visitNum) / 2 }
        avgVisit[it.userId] = newVisit
    }
    println("************浏览邮箱最多的人")
    println("这些人可能更有价值：领导，或者和用户交流的人，适合被盗号和分析")
    avgVisit.values.sortedByDescending { it.visitNum }.take(20).forEach { println(it) }
    println("--------end ----------")
    users.values.forEach { user ->
        val hostGroupBy = user.visitInfo.groupBy { it.host }.toList()
        val newVisitInfo = ArrayList<Visit>()
        hostGroupBy.forEach { hg ->
            val visitNums = hg.second.map { v -> v.visitNum }.toList()
            val variance = variance(visitNums)
            val avg = visitNums.sum() / visitNums.size
            val firstNode = hg.second[0]
            newVisitInfo.add(Visit(user.userId, firstNode.host, avg, "", variance))
        }
        user.visitInfo = newVisitInfo
    }
    val gfile = File("/media/lame/0DD80F300DD80F30/code/koal-helper/src/main/resources/人当天访问数据fc.txt")
    if (gfile.exists()) {
        gfile.delete()
    }
    gfile.createNewFile()
    RandomAccessFile(File("/media/lame/0DD80F300DD80F30/code/koal-helper/src/main/resources/人当天访问数据fc.txt"), "rw").use {
        users.values.forEach { u ->
            u.visitInfo.forEach { v ->
                it.writeUTF("用户：${u.userId},域名:${v.host},访问次数：${v.visitNum},标准差：${v.variance}\n")
            }
        }
    }
    println("===================标准差偏差较大\n更可能是被盗号，或者恶意下载的人")
    val topTen =
        users.values.flatMap { it.visitInfo }.sortedBy { it.variance }.toList().takeLast(20).forEach { println(it) }
    println("-------end-----------")

nc

扫描工具，因为会关闭端口，用它扫会比较稳妥一点

zxing

google开发的扫工具，因为自己写二维码解析遇到的问题比较多，所以选用了大佬写的

在线解密网站

方便解密，解码

基本图像处理知识

能绘制出图片，做些灰度之类处理就行

entry.title: kcsp.md
entry.content:
编程比赛

主要使用编程语言是kotlin ,简单涉及了图像处理

第一题

  1. 在家连的vpn ping 了47.103.87.108 10.99.0.23 不通

  2. 下载nmap 进行 端口扫描

  3. 扫出三个端口，用了第一个 ssh登录成功，wget gitlab 成功

  4. 根据题目描述，用ssh做端口转发，发现用户名密码不对，进不了 gitlab 服务

  5. 考虑了正向代理和直接接口访问 （环境搞起来麻烦，同时发现之前有几个端口不知道做啥的，用其他端口试了下 gitlab登录成功，完成剩下步骤 （按今天说法此处使用了其他队伍建好的nginx代理）

    克服问题

    ssh密码过长，cmd不好复制采用powershell
    nmap扫描命令查询，ssh端口转发命令查询
    成员分工： 郭修军 - 1 2 3 4 5 6， 孙哲和杨毅，在客户现场和项目加班，未参与

第二题

找出图片的隐藏信息，

扫描二维码，得到一个地址，base64 后，发现信息如下

你所需要的所有信息在图片上

由题意大致知道在文件里写了信息，找个png图片,在图片末尾发现不正常字段，大部都是×*X *X,base64 转码，得知图片里9个二维码条。

使用ps 获得最头的其实像素位置，然后以此类推，使用kotlin 读取像素，写入文件，得到9个二维码条。

观察二维码得，二维码满足3个定位点+ 定位点四周为空白通道。将获得的9个二维码条，取他的蓝色通道，然后根据特征，推测出其中5张图片位置。剩下的使用google的zxing做排列组合，自动扫码得唯一密文。

下面是错误时间

密文，结合密钥加偏移索引，由于我是直接找到的密文，导致我丢失了关键信息

附加信息以asn.1 存储，同时指明了密钥，偏移量所在位置。

我直接将时间戳拆成了密钥+偏移量。然后一顿转换想得到能识别的信息，都已失败告终。最后发现二维码描述了s盒变化，执行s盒变化，仍是失败得不到有用信息。第二轮败北。

下面是正确时间

从文件头获取base64的comment,得到附加数据加密和存储位置，用asn.1 转换，得到解码要求所有信息，

第三题

第三题为开放题，给日志得到有效分析结果。很明显有几个方向

  • web安全
  • 人物肖像绘制
  • 公司肖像绘制

由于能力问题，简单的进行了一些分析，并且得到了简易的结果

使用sql

select user_id,http_host,count(*),date_format (date, '%Y-%m-%d') from r3_log group by user_id,http_host,date_format (date, '%Y-%m-%d');

得到简易的数据信息，然后通过计算不同用户的访问次数的标准差，得到标准差访问信息20条，结合数据库得到明显异常访问数据

"user_id","http_host","count(*)","date_format (date, '%Y-%m-%d')"
"317f61dde4a20b66605fdc3bb833dfd3","oa.koal.com","604","2020-11-30"
"317f61dde4a20b66605fdc3bb833dfd3","oa.koal.com","6651","2020-12-01"
"49449f79caad9975ed66e06b9c0fd38f","doc.koal.com","7310","2020-11-24"
"49449f79caad9975ed66e06b9c0fd38f","doc.koal.com","1990","2020-11-25"
"49449f79caad9975ed66e06b9c0fd38f","mail.koal.com","186","2020-11-24"
"49449f79caad9975ed66e06b9c0fd38f","mail.koal.com","507","2020-11-25"
"49449f79caad9975ed66e06b9c0fd38f","mail.koal.com","349","2020-11-26"
"49449f79caad9975ed66e06b9c0fd38f","mail.koal.com","390","2020-11-27"
"49449f79caad9975ed66e06b9c0fd38f","mail.koal.com","149","2020-11-30"
"49449f79caad9975ed66e06b9c0fd38f","mail.koal.com","401","2020-12-01"
"49449f79caad9975ed66e06b9c0fd38f","mail.koal.com","286","2020-12-02"
"49449f79caad9975ed66e06b9c0fd38f","oa.koal.com","126","2020-11-20"
"49449f79caad9975ed66e06b9c0fd38f","oa.koal.com","251","2020-11-23"
"49449f79caad9975ed66e06b9c0fd38f","oa.koal.com","26","2020-11-24"
"49449f79caad9975ed66e06b9c0fd38f","oa.koal.com","257","2020-11-25"
"49449f79caad9975ed66e06b9c0fd38f","oa.koal.com","151","2020-11-26"
"49449f79caad9975ed66e06b9c0fd38f","oa.koal.com","179","2020-11-27"
"49449f79caad9975ed66e06b9c0fd38f","oa.koal.com","194","2020-11-30"
"49449f79caad9975ed66e06b9c0fd38f","oa.koal.com","245","2020-12-01"
"49449f79caad9975ed66e06b9c0fd38f","oa.koal.com","153","2020-12-02"
"5cb796c3b9cdc5b61db916d5bbd403dd","doc.koal.com","3112","2020-11-17"
"5cb796c3b9cdc5b61db916d5bbd403dd","doc.koal.com","10089","2020-11-18"
"5cb796c3b9cdc5b61db916d5bbd403dd","doc.koal.com","2611","2020-11-19"
"5cb796c3b9cdc5b61db916d5bbd403dd","doc.koal.com","2835","2020-11-20"
"5cb796c3b9cdc5b61db916d5bbd403dd","doc.koal.com","3223","2020-11-21"
"5cb796c3b9cdc5b61db916d5bbd403dd","doc.koal.com","1156","2020-11-22"
"5cb796c3b9cdc5b61db916d5bbd403dd","doc.koal.com","262","2020-11-23"
"5cb796c3b9cdc5b61db916d5bbd403dd","doc.koal.com","170","2020-11-24"
"5cb796c3b9cdc5b61db916d5bbd403dd","doc.koal.com","159","2020-11-25"
"5cb796c3b9cdc5b61db916d5bbd403dd","doc.koal.com","919","2020-12-01"
"5cb796c3b9cdc5b61db916d5bbd403dd","doc.koal.com","227","2020-12-02"
"5cb796c3b9cdc5b61db916d5bbd403dd","mail.koal.com","177","2020-11-24"
"5cb796c3b9cdc5b61db916d5bbd403dd","mail.koal.com","120","2020-11-25"
"5cb796c3b9cdc5b61db916d5bbd403dd","mail.koal.com","119","2020-11-26"
"5cb796c3b9cdc5b61db916d5bbd403dd","mail.koal.com","266","2020-11-27"
"5cb796c3b9cdc5b61db916d5bbd403dd","mail.koal.com","70","2020-11-28"
"5cb796c3b9cdc5b61db916d5bbd403dd","mail.koal.com","120","2020-11-29"
"5cb796c3b9cdc5b61db916d5bbd403dd","mail.koal.com","202","2020-11-30"
"5cb796c3b9cdc5b61db916d5bbd403dd","mail.koal.com","80","2020-12-01"
"5cb796c3b9cdc5b61db916d5bbd403dd","mail.koal.com","89","2020-12-02"
"5cb796c3b9cdc5b61db916d5bbd403dd","oa.koal.com","32","2020-11-27"
"5cb796c3b9cdc5b61db916d5bbd403dd","oa.koal.com","75","2020-12-01"
"6cee293782567037b5a20e93b5641c1e","mail.koal.com","96","2020-11-27"
"6cee293782567037b5a20e93b5641c1e","oa.koal.com","23","2020-11-20"
"6cee293782567037b5a20e93b5641c1e","oa.koal.com","5","2020-11-24"
"6cee293782567037b5a20e93b5641c1e","oa.koal.com","11262","2020-11-27"

明显访问异常数据如下

Visit(userId=49449f79caad9975ed66e06b9c0fd38f, host=doc.koal.com, visitNum=4650, date=, variance=2660.0)
Visit(userId=5cb796c3b9cdc5b61db916d5bbd403dd, host=doc.koal.com, visitNum=2251, date=, variance=2752.254877203583)
Visit(userId=317f61dde4a20b66605fdc3bb833dfd3, host=oa.koal.com, visitNum=3627, date=, variance=3023.5000413428143)
Visit(userId=6cee293782567037b5a20e93b5641c1e, host=oa.koal.com, visitNum=3763, date=, variance=5302.36315240667)

得出第一个结论，

49449f79caad9975ed66e06b9c0fd38f，5cb796c3b9cdc5b61db916d5bbd403dd 存在异常文件下载。

6cee293782567037b5a20e93b5641c1e，317f61dde4a20b66605fdc3bb833dfd3 可能存在密码泄密

结论2

根据日常观察，做出论断，经常访问邮箱的人可能更有价值，是领导或者和用户交流的人，适合被盗号和分析

根据结论1 中的数据，使用kotlin处理,得到帐号侧写。

************浏览邮箱最多的人
这些人可能更有价值：领导，或者和用户交流的人，适合被盗号和分析
EmailAvgVisit(userId=1865ef21ee7c4b065c2f507f755df60c, visitNum=1244)
EmailAvgVisit(userId=d87fcc379e0853ad4dd7ae50fb82a825, visitNum=1020)
EmailAvgVisit(userId=d8d172831153ea9c3ba32132b4acc98c, visitNum=1018)
EmailAvgVisit(userId=1a4463c424d3260abf8ce9e870f8523a, visitNum=973)
EmailAvgVisit(userId=004911830ef6a60347d630ff5ce2a1bf, visitNum=811)
EmailAvgVisit(userId=6623c288b54d611b2a0b324e316fd161, visitNum=709)
EmailAvgVisit(userId=10322da519bba59e112e228b401a26cd, visitNum=661)
EmailAvgVisit(userId=7b5e5af6d605e4c1d0efd7621920e3e3, visitNum=658)
EmailAvgVisit(userId=3704234ea06bcba173781a3a7a10d820, visitNum=644)
EmailAvgVisit(userId=a69e1cf3e5fd246627a14fc21a263b3c, visitNum=620)
EmailAvgVisit(userId=f63b1336559f1768dbb514a159a8d1ee, visitNum=567)
EmailAvgVisit(userId=3aec6a16a05eb4c756cd454fa8074b98, visitNum=564)
EmailAvgVisit(userId=0b376d3fedad6aa0ddc2fb28b6bdf863, visitNum=555)
EmailAvgVisit(userId=4c2266d85cfdbcd6e29a76fc80233020, visitNum=552)
EmailAvgVisit(userId=7da1643f0028b417277330c93b278798, visitNum=547)
EmailAvgVisit(userId=0336bf52b737389851f6c2b5b0d53199, visitNum=530)
EmailAvgVisit(userId=cfdad1bc7137af8c804c3ea9b13e44b0, visitNum=528)
EmailAvgVisit(userId=1981a47bc8997466f3907ebf4f1fd56a, visitNum=493)
EmailAvgVisit(userId=93eb74409fab5980f9c2984112dc5c7b, visitNum=491)
EmailAvgVisit(userId=3017eacfd39a18380819c8bbc38747dd, visitNum=468)

web安全方向，

理论上，需要对path进行处理，然后找些开源的url上的攻击sql注入，xss等因为时间和人员关系，并没有来得及处理。

entry.title: kcsp-解题技术_kcsp-第二题源代码.md
entry.content:
kcsp-第二题源代码

这是第二题源代码

import com.google.zxing.BinaryBitmap
import com.google.zxing.MultiFormatReader
import com.google.zxing.client.j2se.BufferedImageLuminanceSource
import com.google.zxing.common.HybridBinarizer

import java.awt.image.BufferedImage
import java.io.File
import java.io.RandomAccessFile
import java.util.*
import javax.imageio.ImageIO
import kotlin.collections.ArrayList
import kotlin.collections.MutableMap
import kotlin.collections.arrayListOf
import kotlin.collections.filter
import kotlin.collections.forEach
import kotlin.collections.forEachIndexed
import kotlin.collections.set
import kotlin.collections.toList


fun getLogInfo() {
    val s = ""
    val chars = s.split("X").toList()
    RandomAccessFile(File("D:/x.txt"), "rw").use {
        chars.forEach { c->
            it.writeByte(c.toInt(16))
        }
    }
}

fun writeLog() {
    RandomAccessFile(File("D:/y.txt"), "rw").use {
        val s1= "F9 96 BA 3A CC 99 C6 0E  FC F5 41 40 8B A5 80 54 "
        val s2="A5 F5 C7 CC 25 86 8D 09  43 EC C8 4F 3C 8A 64 F1 "
        val sk1 = s1.split(" ").filter { it.isNotBlank() }.toList()
        val sk2 = s2.split(" ").filter { it.isNotBlank() }.toList()
        val k = "40".toInt(16)-"4F".toInt(16)
        sk1.forEachIndexed { index, c ->
            var jg = c.toInt(16) - sk2[index].toInt(16)
            var sum = c.toInt(16)-jg
            it.writeByte(sum)
            println(Integer.toHexString(sum))
        }
        println(k)
    }
}

data class Point(val x: Int, val y: Int)
data class Rect(
    val nx:Int,
    val ny:Int,
    val p1: Point, val p2: Point, val p3: Point, val p4: Point)

fun getRect(x: Int, y: Int):Rect {
    val x_step = 32 // 886 就是1
    val y_step = 3
    return Rect(
        x + x_step + 2, y,
        Point(x, y), Point(x, y + y_step), Point(x + x_step, y), Point(x + x_step, y + y_step))
}
fun clopImage() :ArrayList<Rect>{
    val y_step = 31 // 886 就是1
    val x_step = 3
    var x = 884
    var y = 971
    val rects =ArrayList<Rect>()
    for (i in 0..8) {
        val rect = getRect(x, y)
        rects.add(rect)
        x = rect.nx
        y = rect.ny
    }
    return rects
}

fun colorToRGB(red: Int, green: Int, blue: Int): Int {
    var newPixel = 0
    newPixel = newPixel shl 8
    newPixel += red
    newPixel = newPixel shl 8
    newPixel += green
    newPixel shl 8
    newPixel += blue
    return newPixel
}

//position in [0..9]
fun writeImage(source: BufferedImage, rect: Rect,np: BufferedImage, position: Int) {
    var startX = 0
    var startY = 0 + 4 * position
    println("$startX \t $startY")
//    val jg = rect.p1.x - startX
    val tnp = BufferedImage(36, 32, BufferedImage.TYPE_INT_RGB)
    for (x in 0..31) {
        for (y in 0..3) {
            val rgb = source.getRGB(rect.p1.y + y, rect.p1.x + x)
            val r = (rgb shr 16) and 0xf
            val g = (rgb shr 8) and 0xff
            val b = rgb and 0xff
//            val ncolor = if((0.3*r + 0.59*g + 0.11*b)>140){colorToRGB(255, 255, 255)}else{
//                colorToRGB(0,0,0)}
            np.setRGB(startY + y,startX + x , rgb)
            tnp.setRGB(startY + y,startX + x , rgb)
        }
    }
    ImageIO.write(tnp, "png", File("D://x$position.png"))
}
fun readImg(imgX: Int, imgY: Int) {
    val read = ImageIO.read(File("D:\\code\\ok-pdf\\p2.jpg"))
    val np = BufferedImage(36, 32, BufferedImage.TYPE_INT_RGB)
    val clopImages = clopImage()
    //3 5 4
    //3 5
    var sortImage = arrayListOf(clopImages[0], clopImages[1], clopImages[6],
        clopImages[imgX], clopImages[imgY],
        clopImages[2], clopImages[7], clopImages[8])

    for (i in 0..7) {
        writeImage(read, sortImage[i], np, i)
    }
    val x = "${System.currentTimeMillis()}"
//    jzSUbILnPOZeBRlUtKR2Qi8zj7eqLqygsKDuwVfGMdQ=
    ImageIO.write(np, "png", File("D://$x.png"))
    scanQR("D://$x.png")
}

fun scanQR(fp: String) {
    try {
        val formatReader = MultiFormatReader()
        //读取指定的二维码文件
        //读取指定的二维码文件
        val bufferedImage: BufferedImage = ImageIO.read(File(fp))
        val binaryBitmap = BinaryBitmap(HybridBinarizer(BufferedImageLuminanceSource(bufferedImage)))
        //定义二维码参数
        //定义二维码参数
//    val hints = HashMap<Any, Any>()
//    hints[EncodeHintType.CHARACTER_SET] = "utf-8"
        val result: com.google.zxing.Result = formatReader.decode(binaryBitmap)
        //输出相关的二维码信息
        //输出相关的二维码信息
        println("文件路径: $fp")
        println("解析结果：" + result.toString())
        println("二维码格式类型：" + result.getBarcodeFormat())
        println("二维码文本内容：" + result.getText())
    } catch (throwable: Throwable) {
        println("$fp scan error")
    }
}

//5omA5pyJ6ZyA6KaB55qE5L+h5oGv6YO95Zyo6L+Z5byg5Zu+54mH5Lit
//5omA5pyJ6ZyA6KaB55qE5L+h5oGv6YO95Zyo6L+Z5byg5Zu+54mH5Lit
//    jzSUbILnPOZeBRlUtKR2Qi8zj7eqLqygsKDuwVfGMdQ=
//170428000000 0800
//F9 96 BA 3A CC 99 C6 0E FC F5 41 40 8B A5 80 54
//
//A5 F5 C7 CC 25 86 8D 09 43 EC C8 4F 3C 8A 64 F1


//2 这个应该是对的，直接填字符串会被截断
//37 67 38 1D D8 E8 93 10  49 98 B3 CD 25 BA 24 B7
//71 45 B9 E8 E5 56 85 4A  18 2A 59 61 A9 F5 69 04

fun writeLog2() {
    RandomAccessFile(File("D:/y.txt"), "rw").use {
        val s1="37 67 38 1D D8 E8 93 10 49 98 B3 CD 25 BA 24 B7 "
        val s2="71 45 B9 E8 E5 56 85 4A 18 2A 59 61 A9 F5 69 04 "
        val sk1 = s1.split(" ").filter { it.isNotBlank() }.toList()
        val sk2 = s2.split(" ").filter { it.isNotBlank() }.toList()
        val k = "CD".toInt(16) - "61".toInt(16)
        println(k)
        sk1.forEachIndexed { index, c ->
            var jg = c.toInt(16) - sk2[index].toInt(16)
            var sum = c.toInt(16)-jg
//            it.writeByte(sum)
        }
        val s3 = "5omA5pyJ6ZyA6KaB55qE5L+h5oGv6YO95Zyo6L+Z5byg5Zu+54mH5Lit"
        s3.toByteArray().forEach {c ->
            val a = c - k
            it.writeByte(a)
            println(Integer.toHexString(a))
        }
    }
}

fun writeLog3() {
    RandomAccessFile(File("D:/y.txt"), "rw").use {
        val s1="26 22 85 9E E4 A1 65 E2  09 D3 6B 45 C5 02 77 AF "
        val s2="F4 78 7A C4 11 99 09 7D  78 B1 11 0D 55 A0 4D BB "
        val sk1 = s1.split(" ").filter { it.isNotBlank() }.toList()
        val sk2 = s2.split(" ").filter { it.isNotBlank() }.toList()
        val b = "45".toInt(16) - "D".toInt(16)
        sk1.forEachIndexed { index, c ->
            var jg = c.toInt(16) - sk2[index].toInt(16)
            it.writeByte(jg)
//            it.writeByte(sum)
        }
//        sk1.forEachIndexed { index, c ->
//            it.writeByte(c.toInt(16))
//        }
//        sk2.forEachIndexed { index, c ->
//            it.writeByte(c.toInt(16))
//        }
    }
}

/**
 * 遍历所有情况查找二维码 唯一符合
 * 文件路径: D://1630112560545.png
 * 解析结果：jzSUbILnPOZeBRlUtKR2Qi8zj7eqLqygsKDuwVfGMdQ=
 * 二维码格式类型：QR_CODE
 * 二维码文本内容：jzSUbILnPOZeBRlUtKR2Qi8zj7eqLqygsKDuwVfGMdQ=
 * */
fun randImage() {
    val pool = arrayOf(3, 5, 4)
    pool.forEach {i1->
        pool.forEach { i2->
            if (i1 != i2) {
                readImg(i1, i2)
            }
        }
    }
}

fun sbyte() {
    val sbox = arrayOf(
        0x63, 0x7c, 0x77, 0x7b, 0xf2, 0x6b, 0x6f, 0xc5, 0x30, 0x01, 0x67, 0x2b, 0xfe, 0xd7, 0xab, 0x76,
        0xca, 0x82, 0xc9, 0x7d, 0xfa, 0x59, 0x47, 0xf0, 0xad, 0xd4, 0xa2, 0xaf, 0x9c, 0xa4, 0x72, 0xc0,
        0xb7, 0xfd, 0x93, 0x26, 0x36, 0x3f, 0xf7, 0xcc, 0x34, 0xa5, 0xe5, 0xf1, 0x71, 0xd8, 0x31, 0x15,
        0x04, 0xc7, 0x23, 0xc3, 0x18, 0x96, 0x05, 0x9a, 0x07, 0x12, 0x80, 0xe2, 0xeb, 0x27, 0xb2, 0x75,
        0x09, 0x83, 0x2c, 0x1a, 0x1b, 0x6e, 0x5a, 0xa0, 0x52, 0x3b, 0xd6, 0xb3, 0x29, 0xe3, 0x2f, 0x84,
        0x53, 0xd1, 0x00, 0xed, 0x20, 0xfc, 0xb1, 0x5b, 0x6a, 0xcb, 0xbe, 0x39, 0x4a, 0x4c, 0x58, 0xcf,
        0xd0, 0xef, 0xaa, 0xfb, 0x43, 0x4d, 0x33, 0x85, 0x45, 0xf9, 0x02, 0x7f, 0x50, 0x3c, 0x9f, 0xa8,
        0x51, 0xa3, 0x40, 0x8f, 0x92, 0x9d, 0x38, 0xf5, 0xbc, 0xb6, 0xda, 0x21, 0x10, 0xff, 0xf3, 0xd2,
        0xcd, 0x0c, 0x13, 0xec, 0x5f, 0x97, 0x44, 0x17, 0xc4, 0xa7, 0x7e, 0x3d, 0x64, 0x5d, 0x19, 0x73,
        0x60, 0x81, 0x4f, 0xdc, 0x22, 0x2a, 0x90, 0x88, 0x46, 0xee, 0xb8, 0x14, 0xde, 0x5e, 0x0b, 0xdb,
        0xe0, 0x32, 0x3a, 0x0a, 0x49, 0x06, 0x24, 0x5c, 0xc2, 0xd3, 0xac, 0x62, 0x91, 0x95, 0xe4, 0x79,
        0xe7, 0xc8, 0x37, 0x6d, 0x8d, 0xd5, 0x4e, 0xa9, 0x6c, 0x56, 0xf4, 0xea, 0x65, 0x7a, 0xae, 0x08,
        0xba, 0x78, 0x25, 0x2e, 0x1c, 0xa6, 0xb4, 0xc6, 0xe8, 0xdd, 0x74, 0x1f, 0x4b, 0xbd, 0x8b, 0x8a,
        0x70, 0x3e, 0xb5, 0x66, 0x48, 0x03, 0xf6, 0x0e, 0x61, 0x35, 0x57, 0xb9, 0x86, 0xc1, 0x1d, 0x9e,
        0xe1, 0xf8, 0x98, 0x11, 0x69, 0xd9, 0x8e, 0x94, 0x9b, 0x1e, 0x87, 0xe9, 0xce, 0x55, 0x28, 0xdf,
        0x8c, 0xa1, 0x89, 0x0d, 0xbf, 0xe6, 0x42, 0x68, 0x41, 0x99, 0x2d, 0x0f, 0xb0, 0x54, 0xbb, 0x16,
    )
    val isbox= arrayOf(
        0x52, 0x09, 0x6a, 0xd5, 0x30, 0x36, 0xa5, 0x38, 0xbf, 0x40, 0xa3, 0x9e, 0x81, 0xf3, 0xd7, 0xfb,
        0x7c, 0xe3, 0x39, 0x82, 0x9b, 0x2f, 0xff, 0x87, 0x34, 0x8e, 0x43, 0x44, 0xc4, 0xde, 0xe9, 0xcb,
        0x54, 0x7b, 0x94, 0x32, 0xa6, 0xc2, 0x23, 0x3d, 0xee, 0x4c, 0x95, 0x0b, 0x42, 0xfa, 0xc3, 0x4e,
        0x08, 0x2e, 0xa1, 0x66, 0x28, 0xd9, 0x24, 0xb2, 0x76, 0x5b, 0xa2, 0x49, 0x6d, 0x8b, 0xd1, 0x25,
        0x72, 0xf8, 0xf6, 0x64, 0x86, 0x68, 0x98, 0x16, 0xd4, 0xa4, 0x5c, 0xcc, 0x5d, 0x65, 0xb6, 0x92,
        0x6c, 0x70, 0x48, 0x50, 0xfd, 0xed, 0xb9, 0xda, 0x5e, 0x15, 0x46, 0x57, 0xa7, 0x8d, 0x9d, 0x84,
        0x90, 0xd8, 0xab, 0x00, 0x8c, 0xbc, 0xd3, 0x0a, 0xf7, 0xe4, 0x58, 0x05, 0xb8, 0xb3, 0x45, 0x06,
        0xd0, 0x2c, 0x1e, 0x8f, 0xca, 0x3f, 0x0f, 0x02, 0xc1, 0xaf, 0xbd, 0x03, 0x01, 0x13, 0x8a, 0x6b,
        0x3a, 0x91, 0x11, 0x41, 0x4f, 0x67, 0xdc, 0xea, 0x97, 0xf2, 0xcf, 0xce, 0xf0, 0xb4, 0xe6, 0x73,
        0x96, 0xac, 0x74, 0x22, 0xe7, 0xad, 0x35, 0x85, 0xe2, 0xf9, 0x37, 0xe8, 0x1c, 0x75, 0xdf, 0x6e,
        0x47, 0xf1, 0x1a, 0x71, 0x1d, 0x29, 0xc5, 0x89, 0x6f, 0xb7, 0x62, 0x0e, 0xaa, 0x18, 0xbe, 0x1b,
        0xfc, 0x56, 0x3e, 0x4b, 0xc6, 0xd2, 0x79, 0x20, 0x9a, 0xdb, 0xc0, 0xfe, 0x78, 0xcd, 0x5a, 0xf4,
        0x1f, 0xdd, 0xa8, 0x33, 0x88, 0x07, 0xc7, 0x31, 0xb1, 0x12, 0x10, 0x59, 0x27, 0x80, 0xec, 0x5f,
        0x60, 0x51, 0x7f, 0xa9, 0x19, 0xb5, 0x4a, 0x0d, 0x2d, 0xe5, 0x7a, 0x9f, 0x93, 0xc9, 0x9c, 0xef,
        0xa0, 0xe0, 0x3b, 0x4d, 0xae, 0x2a, 0xf5, 0xb0, 0xc8, 0xeb, 0xbb, 0x3c, 0x83, 0x53, 0x99, 0x61,
        0x17, 0x2b, 0x04, 0x7e, 0xba, 0x77, 0xd6, 0x26, 0xe1, 0x69, 0x14, 0x63, 0x55, 0x21, 0x0c, 0x7d,
    )
    RandomAccessFile(File("D:/y.txt"), "rw").use {
        val s1="26 22 85 9E E4 A1 65 E2  09 D3 6B 45 C5 02 77 AF "
        val s2="F4 78 7A C4 11 99 09 7D  78 B1 11 0D 55 A0 4D BB "
        //37 67 38 1D D8 E8 93 10  49 98 B3 CD 25 BA 24 B7
//71 45 B9 E8 E5 56 85 4A  18 2A 59 61 A9 F5 69 04
        val sk1 = s1.split(" ").filter { it.isNotBlank() }.toList()
        val sk2 = s2.split(" ").filter { it.isNotBlank() }.toList()
        sk1.forEach {c->
            val toInt = c.toInt(16)
            val m = (toInt and 0xf0) shr 4
            val n =(toInt and 0x0f)
            it.writeByte(sbox[16 * m + n])
        }
        sk2.forEach {c->
            val toInt = c.toInt(16)
            val m = (toInt and 0xf0) shr 4
            val n =(toInt and 0x0f)
            it.writeByte(sbox[16 * m + n])
        }
    }
}

fun main() {
    sbyte()
}
